title: Idea
description: A single idea generated by a role subagent in any round.

id.description: Unique identifier within the run. Format: <role_id>-r<round>-<sequence>. Example: 'pragmatist-r1-2'.

role.description: The role ID that generated this idea (e.g. 'pragmatist', 'frontend_engineer').

round.description: The round number (1..6) in which this idea was generated.

title.description: Short, concrete title (max 80 chars). Avoid generic phrasing.

hypothesis.description: What is being proposed in 1-2 sentences. Specific and testable, not aspirational.

why_now.description: Why this is relevant or feasible now. Reference research findings or context where possible.

risk.description: The most important risk, objection, or unknown about this idea.

builds_on.description: ID of a parent idea this builds on. NULL for round 1. REQUIRED for rounds 2..N. Must reference a real idea ID from the previous round.

tags.description: Optional thematic tags for later clustering.
